channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: APC Condemns Alleged Involvement of State Publicity Secretary in Kidnap and Murder of Traditional Ruler in Ebonyi
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) for Ebonyi State don express big shock over one of their member wey allegedly involve for the kidnap and killing of HRH Francis Igwe, the traditional ruler of Ndufu...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Raises Concerns Over President Murmu and BJP Amid Controversy
item.description: The ongoing political debate in India has intensified as West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has openly criticised the ruling BJP and the President, Droupadi Murmu. Banerjee claims that the BJP...

item.title: Official Iftar and Sehri Timings for Federal and Provincial Capitals on Ramazan 18 and 19
item.description: Dawn provides updated Sehri and Iftar timings for Ramazan 18 and 19 for all major federal and provincial capitals of Pakistan. For Islamabad, the Hanafia school of thought observes Iftar at 6:11pm tod...

item.title: Court Orders Review After Alleged IVF Embryo Mix-Up in Durban
item.description: A complex legal battle has unfolded in Durban over an alleged IVF mix-up that may have resulted in a child being born from the wrong embryo. A black couple from Ballito claims that one of their embryo...

item.title: Gabriel Diallo beats Andrey Rublev and advances to third round at Indian Wells
item.description: Montreal’s Gabriel Diallo achieved a notable victory at the Indian Wells Open, defeating 17th-seeded Russian Andrey Rublev in a tightly contested second-round match. Diallo lost the first set 6-7 (4) ...

item.title: Australia secures 10-wicket Test win over India as Alyssa Healy retires
item.description: Australia comfortably secured a 10-wicket victory against India in the day-night Test at the WACA Ground, marking a notable end to Alyssa Healy's illustrious Test career, although she did not bat in h...

item.title: Filipinos in UAE Continue Working Despite Regional Conflict
item.description: Amid the ongoing conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran, Filipinos living in the United Arab Emirates are choosing to stay in the country despite missile and drone attacks. According to Migrant Wor...

item.title: TANAPA to Build Five Major Bridges to Improve Access and Safety in Serengeti
item.description: Tanzania National Parks (TANAPA) is set to construct five new modern bridges in Serengeti National Park as part of its plan to strengthen infrastructure and ensure visitor safety. The move comes after...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues Heavy Rain Alert Across Multiple Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a warning for heavy rains across many counties today, March 8, 2026. The ongoing wet spell, which began in mid-February, has already caused loss of lives...

item.title: Envisioning an Equitable Karachi for Women
item.description: In present-day Karachi, women face significant barriers in public spaces due to unequal safety, comfort, and access. Despite being a statistical majority in education—such as 85 percent in medical sch...

item.title: Four men detained over suspected Iranian intelligence activity in London
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have been granted until 13 March to continue questioning four men detained under suspicion of assisting a foreign intelligence service connected to Iran. The individuals, one I...

item.title: Technology Driving Financial Inclusion and Opportunities for Kenyan Women
item.description: On International Women’s Day, Peter Ndegwa highlights how technology is reshaping opportunities for women in Kenya. Digital tools are now crucial for learning, earning, and managing businesses, yet wo...

item.title: Investing in Adolescent Girls Strengthens Communities and Futures
item.description: This International Women’s Day, the focus on 'Give to Gain' emphasises that empowering women and adolescent girls brings benefits to everyone. In Eastern and Southern Africa, adolescent girls face hig...

item.title: Canadian PM backs removal of former Prince Andrew from royal succession
item.description: TOKYO: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has publicly stated that former Prince Andrew should be removed from the line of royal succession due to his highly inappropriate conduct. Andrew Mountbatten...

item.title: Shaibu Pledges NIS Reforms Backed by Tinubu’s Support for Nigerian Sports
item.description: For sure, Nigerian sports dey see correct changes as Philip Shaibu, DG of the National Institute for Sports (NIS), yan how President Bola Tinubu dey ginger him and the entire sports sector. Shaibu com...

item.title: Former police commissioner’s firearms contract failure costs SA over R1bn
item.description: The mishandling of a major firearms contract by former South African Police Service commissioner General Khehla Sitole has burdened taxpayers with over R1 billion in costs. The original R460 million c...

item.title: Trump's demand for Iran's surrender escalates Middle East conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump sharply escalated tensions in the Middle East by demanding Iran's 'unconditional surrender' just one week after starting a war alongside Israel. This demand complicates ongoi...

item.title: Understanding LED Headlight Glare and Its Effect on Eyes
item.description: Many drivers have noticed that LED headlights, which are increasingly common on newer vehicles, can be blinding or uncomfortable, especially at night. Despite this, ophthalmologists say there is no ev...

item.title: Marcos vows prompt and impartial government aid for all citizens
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has guaranteed that government assistance, especially for senior citizens, will be delivered quickly and without political bias. Speaking in his vlog, the President enco...

item.title: Actor and Acting Coach Corey Parker Passes Away at Age 60 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Corey Parker, well-known for his work on television series including the popular show ‘Will & Grace’, has passed away at the age of 60 following a prolonged battle with cancer. He died on Thursday in ...
